reviews.comment:
Se nos cayó el chapón a 1 km del ACA de Gorch Gracias a los genios de Franco y  Rubén que con suma amabilidad nos ayudaron en la fosa, seguimos viaje rapidísimo.
En este lugar paro desde mi infancia yendo a Colina, siempre gauchos y atentos a lo que uno necesita.

(Translated by Google)
Our roof plate fell off 1 km from the ACA in Gorch. Thanks to the wonderful Franco and Rubén, who very kindly helped us in the pit, we continued our journey very quickly. I've been stopping at this place since I was a child on my way to Colina; the locals are always friendly and attentive to our needs.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) One of the best places I've stayed here in the interior of Argentina. Very kind and pleasant staff.

We used the local internet, which is reliable, and we weren't disturbed at any time while we were working there.

It's worth the stop. There's a very beautiful forest next door where you can stay or spend the night without setting up camp. Another successful YPF experience.

(Original)
Um dos melhores lugares que fiquei aqui no interior da Argentina. Equipe muito gentil e agradável.

Usamos a internet do local que é honesta e  não fomos perturbados em momento nenhum durante o momento em que ficamos trabalhando no local.

Vale a pena a parada. Tem um bosque bem bonito do lado e que dá para ficar ou pernoitar sem montar acampamento. Mais um YPF sucesso.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toalgweFZWMUpXUTJ4a05scHdkWFJLTW5KSmNIYxAB

Hamacas y parque limpio

Tables in the shade, clean restrooms
Hammocks and a clean park
We wanted to buy mayonnaise and they didn't have any. They kindly gave us some packets.
